results.title: What a reporter found when uncovering why federal agents allowed a deadly drug to hit the streets
results.description: Associated Press journalist Jim Mustian explains how he reported and wrote a story that examined why the U.S. Drug Enforcement Administration allowed hundreds of thousands of fentanyl pills to hit the streets of New Mexico from 2023 to 2025. The...
